programs.title: The Block
programs.desc: Shelley Craft introduces the teams to furniture designer Mark Tuckey for their latest challenge. There's plenty of enthusiasm from the contestants who must design and create a table to be used in their apartments. First prize is $5,000 cash.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.

programs.title: Small Town Potential
programs.desc: A chef and his wife look to put down roots near family in the Hudson Valley and want a home with a great kitchen and room to grow. Davina and Kristin are challenged with a modest budget and tight spaces to deliver a house that's both fun and functional.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Trading the Circus for Puerto Vallarta, Mexico
programs.desc: A former circus gymnast looks to leave the Massachusetts cold and embrace the sunshine of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. He wants to establish a new business, so now he's under the pressure to find both a living and workspace before his nest egg runs out.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programs.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.
